creator: zy@miator.net
text:
(In reply to Koichiro IWAO from comment #7)
> And, please discuss in public about upgrading fcitx if you're working on
> that with Hiroto.
> 
> Other people also want to know the progress. Discussing in public is useful
> for that and can reduce waste of time.

You can watch the github repo... I've been using it for quite a while, but the stupid stupid yaml-cpp is still blocking us from upgrading.  The problem is that yaml-cpp 0.3 and 0.5 are completely two different libraries, but the author give them the same soname (!!!).

So here is the plan: we need to manually hack the existing yaml-cpp-0.3 ports by changing its soname to yaml-cpp03 (rpm, deb do the same thing), rename the port as well, changes all ports (there're 2-3 of them) depends on it, then we can import all fcitx related upgrades.

If you can solve the yaml-cpp problem, we will be very appreciate.
